entries.source: data interpretation AI
entries.value: i-AI yokuhumusha idatha

entries.source: Data Interpreter
entries.value: Umhumushi Wedatha

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Data Interpreter iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Namathisela idatha, izincazelo zamashadi, noma imiphumela bese ufunda ukuthi zisho ukuthini, zingasho ukuthini, nokuthi yini ongayibuza ngokulandelayo.

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Data Interpreter: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Data Interpreter prompts and study loop
entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Data Interpreter nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Izinsuku nezifinyezo zibalulekile, kodwa abafundi bavame ukudinga indlela yokungena esimweni sabantu: lokho abantu ababekukholelwa, izinqumo abazibonayo, imikhawulo eyababumba, nalokho ababengeke bakwazi ukukwazi.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Phikisana nganoma yisiphi isihloko, uthole inselelo, uqhathanise izimangalo, futhi ufunde ukwenza izimpikiswano eziqinile.

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Impikiswano ikusiza ukuhlukanisa izimangalo, ubufakazi, amagugu, nokucatshangwayo, okwenza ukuhumusha umlando kube nokunemba okukhulu.

entries.source: Debate justice with Batman
entries.value: Phikisana ngobulungiswa no-Batman

entries.source: Debate modes that help learners make claims, face counterarguments, and improve reasoning under pressure.
entries.value: Izindlela zenkulumo-mpikiswano ezisiza abafundi ukwenza izimangalo, ukubhekana nezimpikiswano eziphikisayo, nokuthuthukisa ukucabanga ngaphansi kwengcindezi.

entries.source: Debate the claim
entries.value: Phikisa isimangalo

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Phikisa isimangalo kusuka ezinhlangothini ezingaphezu kweyodwa ukuze uqaphele okucatshangwayo, ukuhwebelana, nobufakazi obubuthaka.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Phikisa lesi simangalo somlando noma sefilosofi kusuka ezinhlangothini zombili. Hlukanisa ubufakazi, okucatshangwayo, namagugu.

entries.source: Debate through a chosen voice
entries.value: Phikisana ngezwi elikhethiwe

entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Debate with a personality nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI
entries.value: Phikisana Nobuntu Usebenzisa i-AI

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Phikisana Nobuntu Usebenzisa i-AI kuyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Yisho ubuntu bangempela noma obuqanjiwe bese uphikisana nabo nganoma yisiphi isihloko. I-AI isebenzisa isitayela sabo somphakathi nombono wabo womhlaba kuyilapho igcina inkulumo-mpikiswano inobulungiswa.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Phikisana Nobuntu Usebenzisa i-AI: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Define rules, milestones, review checkpoints, and recovery steps.
entries.value: Chaza imithetho, izigaba, izindawo zokubuyekeza, nezinyathelo zokululama.

entries.source: Define terms, test examples, compare views, and invite the learner's position.
entries.value: Chaza amagama, hlola izibonelo, qhathanisa imibono, bese umema isikhundla somfundi.

entries.source: Define the deadline and scope
entries.value: Chaza umnqamulajuqu nobubanzi

entries.source: Define the goal
entries.value: Chaza umgomo

entries.source: Define, show examples, ask the learner to use words, and review missed items.
entries.value: Chaza, bonisa izibonelo, cela umfundi asebenzise amagama, bese ubuyekeza izinto eziphuthelwe.

entries.source: Definitions
entries.value: Izincazelo

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Susa amakhadi abanzi kakhulu noma asobala kakhulu.

entries.value: Indlela yokukhishwa

entries.value: Chaza noma unamathisele imininingwane esithombeni futhi uthole usizo lokufunda imidwebo, amashadi, izinkinga, amanothi abhalwe ngesandla, noma ubufakazi obubonakalayo.

entries.source: Describe the image or paste what is visible
entries.value: Chaza isithombe noma unamathisele lokho okubonakalayo

entries.value: Dala ibhodi labaholi lekilasi

entries.value: Dala isivivinyo sokukhula kwezitshalo

entries.value: Dizayina uhlelo lwamaphuzu, amazinga, imisebenzi, nemiklomelo ngokusekelwe enqubekelaphambili yangempela yokufunda.

entries.value: Dizayina isiphrinti sokubuyekeza

entries.value: Dala ukubuyekeza okuncane kwansuku zonke

entries.value: Dizayina izimpawu zokuqondisa, nciphisa ukungqubuzana, landelela imizamo, bese ululama kokuphuthelwe.

entries.source: Design leaderboards that motivate without distorting learning.
entries.value: Dizayina amabhodi okuhola akhuthaza ngaphandle kokuphazamisa ukufunda.

entries.source: Design levels for coding practice
entries.value: Dizayina amazinga okuzijwayeza ukubhala ikhodi

entries.source: Design meaningful achievement systems for learning.
entries.value: Dizayina izinhlelo zempumelelo ezinencazelo yokufunda.

entries.source: Designed for confidence
entries.value: Yakhelwe ukuzethemba

entries.source: Diagnose and repair misconceptions.
entries.value: Xilonga futhi ulungise ukungaqondi.

entries.source: Diagnose, suggest revisions, invite learner choice, and iterate.
entries.value: Xilonga, phakamisa ukubuyekeza, mema ukukhetha komfundi, bese uphindaphinda.

entries.value: ukulebula imidwebo

entries.value: Ukuzilolonga Ukulebula Imidwebo

entries.source: Did the AI check your reasoning instead of simply replacing it?
entries.value: Ingabe i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho esikhundleni sokukushintsha nje?

entries.source: Did you answer at least one question before reading the correction?
entries.value: Ingabe uphendule okungenani umbuzo owodwa ngaphambi kokufunda ukulungiswa?

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Imisebenzi ehlukile idinga izindlela ezihlukile: imibuzo ye-Socratic, izeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, amakhadi okufunda, inkulumo-mpikiswano, ukudlala indima yomlando, ukugxekwa kokubhala, nokunye.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Imisebenzi yokufunda ehlukile idinga ukugeleza okuhlukile. Sebenzisa umqeqeshi womsebenzi wasekhaya ukuze uthole izeluleko, umqeqeshi wezinyathelo ze-math ukuze uxazulule izinkinga, uthisha we-Socratic ukuze uqonde ngokujulile, amakhadi okufunda ukuze ukhumbule, nama-quiz ukuze uzijwayeze ngaphansi kwengcindezi.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Imisebenzi yokufunda ehlukile idinga izimo zokuxhumana ezihlukile, ngakho i-inspir isebenzisa ukufundisa okusebenzayo okuqondene nemodi. Iseluleko somsebenzi wasekhaya, umbuzo we-Socratic, ukulingisa umlando, ukubuyekeza amakhadi okufunda, nokugxeka ukubhala akufanele kuziphathe njengengxoxo evamile efanayo.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Imisebenzi yokufunda ehlukile idinga izimo ezihlukile: imibuzo ye-Socratic, izeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, amakhadi okufunda, inkulumo-mpikiswano, ukudlala indima yomlando, ukugxekwa kokubhala, nokuhlela ukufunda.

entries.source: Different people need different AI learning routes.
entries.value: Abantu abahlukene badinga imizila yokufunda nge-AI ehlukile.

entries.source: Disallowed
entries.value: Akuvunyelwe

entries.source: Disclaimer Of Warranty
entries.value: Ukuphikwa Kwesiqinisekiso

entries.source: Disclosure of Data
entries.value: Ukudalulwa Kwedatha

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you
entries.value: Thola izindlela ezikufanele

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: Thola izindlela ezikufanelayo.

entries.source: Discovery
entries.value: Ukuthola

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: Ukutholwa kuvulekile lapho okuqukethwe kungokomphakathi.

entries.source: Dismiss language options
entries.value: Vala izinketho zolimi

entries.source: Distribution that started offline
entries.value: Ukusabalalisa okwaqala ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi

entries.source: Diverge, cluster, choose, refine, and make the idea actionable.
entries.value: Hlukanisa imibono, yihlanganise ngamaqoqo, khetha, cija, bese wenza umqondo usebenzeke.

entries.source: DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims
entries.value: Isaziso se-DMCA Nenqubo Yezimangalo Zokwephulwa Kwe-Copyright

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Ngiyazi yini okufanele ngizijwayeze ngokulandelayo?

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Ungawamukeli umusho obuyekeziwe uze ukwazi ukuchaza ukuthi kungani ukubuyekeza kungcono.

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: Ungenzi njengothisha we-Q&A ongenzi lutho noma ungcwabe umsebenzi engxoxweni. Ungadumisi ngokweqile umsebenzi obuthakathaka. Gcina umsebenzisi engumnikazi wesinqumo, gcina izwi lakhe emisebenzini yokubhala, bese uqeda amasession ngento ecacile noma isinyathelo esilandelayo.

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: Ungaqhubeki nje ngoba umfundi echofoze okulandelayo. Dinga ubufakazi, yisho ukungaqondi ngokucacile, futhi ulungise izixhumanisi ezibuthakathaka ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: Ungakhulisi izimpikiswano ezinenzondo noma eziyingozi. Hlela kabusha izihloko ezibucayi uzigxilise ebufakazini, ezimimisweni zokuziphatha, nasekufundeni.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Ungaceli isifinyezo esiphelele ngaphambi kokwazi imibono eyisisekelo edingekayo.

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: Ungaceli abafundi basebenzise ikhodi engaphephile. Chaza ikhodi ethinta ukuphepha ezingeni eliphezulu lapho kudingeka.

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: Ungabuzi ukuthi yimuphi umkhiqizo onqobayo. Buza ukuthi ikuphi ukuziphatha kokufunda okufanele.

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: Ungathi uqinisekisa okukhona manje ngaphandle kwamathuluzi. Ncoma ukuhlola imithombo eyinhloko yamaqiniso amanje.

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: Ungaqedeli umsebenzi omakwe amamaki esikhundleni somfundi. Menze abe umnikazi wempendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: Ungadidanisi impendulo esheshayo nobungcweti.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Ungaphikisi uhlangothi osuvele uvumelana nalo kuphela.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Ungakunaki ukungabaza; ukungaqiniseki kuwuphawu oluwusizo lokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: Ungaqambi imininingwane yezincwadi. Maka izinkambu ezingaziwa ngokucacile.

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: Ungaqambi izikhombo. Maka ngokucacile lapho kudingeka ukuqinisekiswa komthombo.

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: Ungafundisi njengenkulumo ngokuzenzakalela, ungabuzi imibuzo eminingi kakhulu, ungafihli inqubekela phambili, noma ulahle impendulo ngokushesha kakhulu. Sebenzisa izitebhisi zezeluleko ngaphambi kwezincazelo. Uma umfundi ecela incazelo eqondile, yinike kafushane bese udinga isifinyezo sokugcina ngamazwi akhe. Ezimweni zezokwelapha, zomthetho, zezimali, noma ezibucayi, faka isexwayiso esifanele futhi ugweme ukuphushela esiphethweni esifihlekile.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Ungavumeli ukudlala indima kuthathe indawo yezinsuku, umongo, imibhalo, noma amalebula obufakazi.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Ungenzi uhlelo olucabanga ukuthi zonke izihloko zidinga isikhathi esilinganayo.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Ungenzi amakhadi enkumbulo ngemisho ongakakwazi ukuyichaza ngamazwi akho.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Unganamathiseli umsebenzi bese ucela impendulo ephelile.

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: Unganikezi umbhalo omude one-copyright. Sebenza ngezicashunwa ezinikezwe umsebenzisi noma izifinyezo ezimfushane.

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: Unganikezi ukwelashwa noma ukwelulekwa ngesikhathi senhlekelele. Khuthaza ukwesekwa komuntu omethembayo lapho kunokudangala okukhulu.

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: Ungaphindi ukhiphe iziqeshana ezinde ezine-copyright. Fingqa umbhalo onikezwe umsebenzisi.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Ungaphindi ufunde amanothi ngaphambi kokuhlola lokho osuvele ukukhumbula.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Ungabuyekezi konke ngokulinganayo

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: Ungahlazisi amaphutha. Emsebenzini omakwe amamaki, qeqesha ukuqonda esikhundleni sokukhiqiza okuzothunyelwa.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Ungakweqi ukukhombisa lokho osuvele ukuzamile; usizo oluwusizo luncike kulowo mongo.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Ungami ngemva kwencazelo yokuqala; ziphoqe ukuphendula imibuzo ngayo.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Ungayithathi ingxoxo ekhiqiziwe njengengcaphuno yangempela noma umthombo oyinhloko.

entries.source: Do something with it
entries.value: Yenza okuthile ngayo

entries.source: Do the comparison pages include private user chats?
entries.value: Ingabe amakhasi okuqhathanisa afaka izingxoxo zangasese zabasebenzisi?

entries.source: Do these guides connect to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Ingabe le mihlahlandlela ixhuma kumathuluzi okufunda nge-AI abukhoma?

entries.source: Do we have free will?
entries.value: Ingabe sinenkululeko yokuzikhethela?

entries.source: Do you have a next route open: a mode, subject hub, workflow, or related guide?
entries.value: Ingabe unomzila olandelayo ovulekile: imodi, isikhungo sesifundo, ukugeleza komsebenzi, noma umhlahlandlela ohlobene?

entries.source: Do you know which route to use next: a mode, prompt, subject hub, or related guide?
entries.value: Uyazi ukuthi yimuphi umzila ongawusebenzisa ngokulandelayo: imodi, umyalo, isikhungo sesifundo, noma umhlahlandlela ohlobene?

entries.source: Does inspir expose private homework chats to Google?
entries.value: Ingabe i-inspir iveza izingxoxo zangasese zomsebenzi wasekhaya ku-Google?

entries.source: Does inspir publish a child's private chats?
entries.value: Ingabe i-inspir ishicilela izingxoxo zangasese zengane?

entries.source: Does inspir support schools?
entries.value: Ingabe i-inspir isekela izikole?

entries.source: Does this comparison include private user chats?
entries.value: Ingabe lokhu kuqhathanisa kufaka izingxoxo zangasese zabasebenzisi?

entries.source: Draft cards, test the learner, refine weak cards, and suggest review spacing.
entries.value: Bhala amakhadi okuqala, hlola umfundi, cija amakhadi abuthakathaka, bese uphakamisa izikhawu zokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Draw a supply-demand graph
entries.value: Dweba igrafu yokunikezwa nokufunwa

entries.source: Draw/Sketch Board
entries.value: Ibhodi Lokudweba/Lokudweba Imidwebo

entries.source: due date
entries.value: usuku lokugcina

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: Isihloko ngasinye sibhalelwe ukusiza abafundi, abazali, abafundisi, nabakhi basebenzise i-AI ukuze baqonde, bazijwayeze, futhi bathembe.

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: Indlela ngayinye yezithameli ixhuma ezindaweni zokufunda zomphakathi ezingacacela abakhasa.

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: Isigaba ngasinye sinenhloso yaso yosesho, izixhumanisi zemodi ebukhoma, nesakhiwo somhlahlandlela ukuze umtapo ube wusizo kubantu futhi ufundeke ezinhlelweni zosesho.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Ukuqhathanisa ngakunye kubhalelwa ukuba nobulungiswa, kube wusizo, futhi kugxile esenzweni: ithuluzi elaziwayo lihle kuphi, i-inspir ihluke kuphi, nokuthi iyiphi imodi yomphakathi okufanele ivulwe kuqala.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Inkombandlela ngayinye iphetha ngezinhlelo zokuzijwayeza, imizila, nezixhumanisi eziya emodini yokufunda efanele ngqo.

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: Isikhungo ngasinye singumhlahlandlela wesifundo ongacaca ezinjinini zokusesha, kodwa futhi sithumela abafundi ngqo ekufundeni kwemodi yesivakashi ebukhoma esikhundleni sokubashiya ekhasini lobrochure.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Imodi ngayinye yokufunda ine-URL yomphakathi ukuze abafundi bafike besuka kusesho ngqo kulwazi lokufunda olufanele.

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: Ikhadi ngalinye lemephu lixhumanisa isidingo sangempela somfundi nezindlela ezibukhoma, imiyalo yokuqala, imihlahlandlela ejulile, nomjikelezo wokubuyekeza. Abantu bangalisebenzisa. Abakhasa bangaliqonda.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Imodi ngayinye ivuleka njengengxoxo yesivakashi yomphakathi enenjongo yayo, izibonelo, nokugeleza kokufunda, ukuze abafundi baqale ngokusekelwa okufanele ngokushesha.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Ikhasi ngalinye lixhumanisa inhloso yokuqhathanisa nezindlela ezibukhoma, imihlahlandlela, imiyalo, namafayela okutholwa afundeka yi-AI.

entries.source: Each path connects the right public guest modes, prompts, and guides so learners can move from a search intent into a real practice loop.
entries.value: Indlela ngayinye ixhumanisa izindlela ezifanele zesivakashi somphakathi, imiyalo, nemihlahlandlela ukuze abafundi basuke enhlosweni yosesho baye emjikelezweni wokuzijwayeza wangempela.

entries.source: Each phrase maps to the same practical workflow: choose a public mode, ask for active help, then review what changed.
entries.value: Ibinzana ngalinye limelela ukugeleza komsebenzi okufanayo okusebenzayo: khetha imodi yomphakathi, cela usizo olusebenzayo, bese ubuyekeza okushintshile.

entries.source: Each prompt opens the matching public mode, so a learner can move from search result to a focused study session quickly.
entries.value: Umyalo ngamunye uvula imodi yomphakathi ehambisanayo, ukuze umfundi asuke emiphumeleni yosesho aye eseshini yokutadisha egxilile ngokushesha.

entries.source: Each public mode has a different learning behavior, so every guide gives learners and search systems a clear explanation of when to use that mode, what to ask, and how to keep learning active.
entries.value: Imodi ngayinye yomphakathi inokuziphatha kokufunda okuhlukile, ngakho umhlahlandlela ngamunye unikeza abafundi nezinhlelo zosesho incazelo ecacile yokuthi imodi isetshenziswa nini, yini okufanele ibuzwe, nokuthi ukufunda kugcinwa kanjani kusebenzayo.

entries.source: Each route ends with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a source check, or a study plan.
entries.value: Umzila ngamunye uphela ngokuchaza futhi, i-quiz, ikhadi lokufunda, ukuhlola umthombo, noma uhlelo lokutadisha.

entries.source: Each step opens a live guest mode, so this is not a static guide. It is a route into practice, feedback, and review.
entries.value: Isinyathelo ngasinye sivula imodi yesivakashi ebukhoma, ngakho lokhu akuwona umhlahlandlela omile. Kungumzila oya ekuzijwayezeni, empendulweni, nasekubuyekezeni.

entries.source: Each subject hub names the learning job, recommends the right focused modes, and shows how to finish with evidence of understanding instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: Isikhungo ngasinye sesifundo sisho umsebenzi wokufunda, sincoma izindlela ezifanele ezigxilile, futhi sibonisa indlela yokuqeda ngobufakazi bokuqonda esikhundleni sokukopisha izimpendulo ungenzi lutho.

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Ethics Dilemmas iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Sebenza ngezinkinga zokuziphatha ngokukala ababambiqhaza, imiphumela, imisebenzi, amalungelo, nokuhwebelana.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.

entries.source: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, YOU WILL HOLD US AND OUR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS HARMLESS FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER IT ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES AND ALL RELATED COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION AND ARBITRATION, OR AT TRIAL OR ON APPEAL, IF ANY, WHETHER OR NOT LITIGATION OR ARBITRATION IS INSTITUTED), WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, OR ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT AND ANY VIOLATION BY YOU OF ANY FEDERAL, STATE, OR LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, RULES, OR REGULATIONS, EVEN IF COMPANY HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, IF THERE IS LIABILITY FOUND ON THE PART OF COMPANY, IT WILL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID FOR THE PRODUCTS AND/OR SERVICES, AND UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL THERE BE CONSEQUENTIAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE PRIOR LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.

NGAPHANDLE KWALAPHO KUVINJWE UMTHETHO, UMA KUTHOLAKALA UKUTHI INKAMPANI INESIBOPHO, SIZOKHAWULELWA ENANINI ELIKHOKHELWE IMIKHIQIZO NOMA IZINSIZA, FUTHI NGAPHANSI KWAZO ZONKE IZIMO NGEKE KUBE NOMONAKALO OLANDELANAYO NOMA OYISIGWEBO. EZINYE IZIFUNDAZWE AZIKUVUMELI UKUKHISHWA NOMA UKUKHAWULELWA KOMONAKALO OYISIGWEBO, OWENZEKA NGOKUNGALINDELEKILE NOMA OLANDELANAYO, NGAKHO UMKHAWULO NOMA UKUKHISHWA OKWANGAPHAMBILI KUNGASE KUNGASEBENZI KUWE.

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Explain My Answer iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Namathisela umbuzo, impendulo yakho, nempendulo elindelekile uma unayo. Umngane wakho uchaza ukucabanga futhi akusize ugweme iphutha elifanayo ngokuzayo.
